name: liang-shisan-agent
description: IT Operations Assistant for Qunar.com — auto-detects work orders, manages assets, configures email, and provides remote access codes.

displayDescription.en: IT operations specialist for Qunar Chengdu, handling work orders, asset management, email setup, and remote access support.
displayDescription.zh: 去哪儿成都茂业IT运维助手，自动提工单、管资产出入库、查邮箱推远程码，无需激活词。

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 我电脑出问题了，重启了一下好了
defaultInitPrompt.en: My computer crashed, I restarted and it's fine now

quickPrompts.en: My computer crashed, I restarted and it's fine now
quickPrompts.zh: 我电脑出问题了，重启了一下好了

quickPrompts.en: Check if zhangsan's email is set up
quickPrompts.zh: 查一下张三的邮箱开通了没

quickPrompts.en: Give me the remote access code
